evals.prompt: Run Stage 4 solution design on the SSO SAML feature. Stage 3 task synthesis is complete — draft task model produced (pending user confirmation). Design the implementation and present combined review (understanding + design) to the user.
evals.expected_output: Should produce implementation-design.md, change-map.md, design-decisions.md, design-review-package.md (combined format with Part 1 Understanding, Part 2 Design, Part 3 Key Decisions). Design architect subagent should explore the codebase. Design critic should return DESIGN_APPROVED. Should present combined review to user. Should finalize agreed-task-model.md after user confirms.

assertions.text: implementation-design.md created with all required sections (Implementation Approach, Solution Description, Change Details, Key Technical Decisions, Implementation Sequence, Risk Zones)
change-map.md created with file-level changes covering auth, tenant, user, config, migrations, and server modules
design-decisions.md created with decisions about: per-tenant config table design, auth code flow approach, account linking strategy, Keycloak IdP management approach
design-review-package.md created as combined review with Part 1 (Task Understanding: goal, scope, scenarios, constraints), Part 2 (Implementation Design), and Part 3 (Key Decisions, max 5)
Design architect subagent was spawned and explored the codebase
Design critic subagent was spawned and returned a verdict
Implementation sequence respects dependencies (e.g., migration before tenant repository, tenant before auth service)
Combined review includes task understanding from Stage 3 (goal, scope, key scenarios, constraints) alongside design decisions
agreed-task-model.md is finalized (status changed from draft to confirmed) after user review

evals.prompt: Run Stage 4 solution design on the dashboard performance optimization task. Stage 3 synthesis is complete — draft task model produced. Design the implementation for full-stack optimization and present combined review.
evals.expected_output: Should produce all design artifacts. Should design changes across backend (parallelization, caching) and frontend (progressive loading, downsampling). Combined review package should include understanding + design. Should identify the retention cohort bug fix in the change map.

assertions.text: implementation-design.md created with all required template sections
change-map.md created with files from both backend (internal/analytics/, internal/clickhouse/, internal/cache/) and frontend (apps/dashboard/)
Implementation approach addresses the 3-layer optimization: backend parallelization, caching with singleflight, and frontend progressive loading
change-map.md includes the retention cohort bug fix at queries.go:67-85
Design decisions include: errgroup vs goroutine management, cache TTL strategy per chart type, singleflight integration point, downsampling algorithm choice
Implementation sequence starts with backend changes before frontend to allow incremental validation
Risk zones include connection pool sizing and thundering herd scenarios with specific mitigations
design-review-package.md is a combined review with task understanding (Part 1) and design (Part 2) and key decisions (Part 3)
agreed-task-model.md is finalized after user confirms the combined review

evals.prompt: Run Stage 4 solution design. Here are the analysis files from Stage 3.
evals.expected_output: Stage 4 should reject or flag that Stage 3 is incomplete — no agreed-task-model.md exists, analysis is shallow, and the handoff notes that synthesis was not completed.

assertions.text: Stage 4 detected missing agreed-task-model.md (neither draft nor confirmed)
Stage 4 flagged that Stage 3 is incomplete
User was told to go back to Stage 3 or complete the task synthesis
No implementation-design.md or change-map.md were created from incomplete inputs
The response mentions that the task model does not exist
